steps.title: Join two full clauses
steps.content: The text has two independent clauses: one about the Forth Road Bridge being among the longest and one about the Yavuz Sultan Selim Bridge being longer. The relationship is contrast.

steps.title: Use comma plus but
steps.content: Choice A adds an incorrect comma after the conjunction. Choice B uses only a comma, creating a comma splice and losing the contrast signal. Choice D omits the needed comma before a coordinating conjunction joining two independent clauses. The answer is C.
